# AutoUAT

> Stochastic UAT/UX optimization runner that finds bugs humans miss. Point it at any web app URL - it crawls pages, generates test scenarios using adaptive sampling, and produces severity-ranked HTML reports with inline screenshots. No test code required.

## Overview

AutoUAT is a desktop application, CLI tool, and MCP server for automated user acceptance testing. It uses Playwright-based browser automation combined with AI-powered evaluation to discover bugs across browsers, viewports, and user roles that manual QA consistently misses.

Unlike Selenium, Cypress, or Playwright test suites, AutoUAT requires zero test code. You provide a URL. It discovers pages, generates scenarios, executes them across Chromium/Firefox/WebKit/Electron, and produces a shareable HTML report.

## Key Capabilities

- Zero-config URL scanning - paste a URL, get findings
- Adaptive Thompson sampling - focuses on high-yield areas automatically
- Multi-browser testing - Chromium, Firefox, WebKit, and Electron simultaneously
- AI critic panel - 3-persona LLM evaluation with 2-of-3 consensus
- 12+ deterministic evaluators - console errors, network failures, layout overflow, accessibility (axe-core), performance (LCP/CLS)
- Interactive review studio - offline HTML report with screenshot overlays and annotations
- MCP server with 11 tools for AI agent integration
- Step recorder - record clicks, form fills, and navigation in a live browser
- Encrypted login profiles - store credentials per user role for authenticated testing
- Safe mode - block destructive paths, selectors, HTTP methods for production safety
- Site probe - quick pre-scan estimates pages, forms, auth walls, and test time
- LLM export - one-click copy findings as markdown for AI coding agents
- 8 LLM providers - OpenRouter, Anthropic, OpenAI, Ollama, LM Studio, Together, Groq, custom
- SPA-aware discovery - click-and-detect for React, Vue, and Electron apps
- 14 framework resolvers - auto-detect stack, install deps, start dev servers
- Run history and replay - browse, replay, and compare past test runs

## Pricing

$39 one-time purchase. Own it forever. 3 device activations included. Free updates.

Purchase: https://buy.polar.sh/polar_cl_Wq5KOusjR20r7FkluLa4X8bqKMdPz9ICDbkqs2tmJ8R

## Comparison

| Feature | AutoUAT | Selenium | Cypress | Playwright Test |
|---------|---------|----------|---------|-----------------|
| Test code required | No | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| Auto-discovery | Yes | No | No | No |
| AI evaluation | Yes | No | No | No |
| Multi-browser | 4 engines | Yes | Limited | Yes |
| SPA / Electron | Native | Limited | Limited | Limited |
| Safe mode | Built-in | No | No | No |
| Step recorder | Yes | IDE plugin | No | Codegen |
| Setup time | 2 min | Hours | 30 min | 30 min |
| Report generation | Built-in | Manual | Manual | Manual |

## Technical Stack

TypeScript, Playwright, Electron, React, Zod, vitest (742 tests passing), 40,000+ lines of TypeScript
